message:
feat(demo): add mouse navigation + keyboard shortcuts to Explainability Cockpit

- Click panels (Diff/Resize/Budget/Timeline) to focus with double-border highlight
- Wheel scroll on timeline to navigate evidence history
- Keys 1/2/3/4 to focus panels, n/p and arrow keys to scroll timeline
- Cache layout rects via Cell<Rect> for hit testing
- Add timeline scroll offset with scroll indicator

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
